commandId.description: The canonical command id the tool dispatches to (equal to toolId).

description.description: Longer tool description surfaced to the agent.

destructive.description: Whether the tool performs a destructive operation; only true when a destructive id is explicitly enabled via mcp.allow.

inputSchema.description: JSON-Schema-shaped object derived from the command's flags/args.

toolId.description: Canonical command id exposed as this tool (e.g. "app:info").
